mapper.select:
SELECT CAMP_SEQ, TITLE, THUMB_PATH, GOAL_AMT, CURRENT_AMT, START_DT, END_DT, USE_YN, REG_DT, -- 프론트엔드 노출용 달성률(%) 및 D-Day 계산 로직 추가 FLOOR((CURRENT_AMT / GOAL_AMT) * 100) AS achievementRate, DATEDIFF(END_DT, CURDATE()) AS dDay FROM TB_CAMPAIGN WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(CAMP_SEQ) FROM TB_CAMPAIGN WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT * FROM TB_CAMPAIGN WHERE CAMP_SEQ = #{campSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT *, FLOOR((CURRENT_AMT / GOAL_AMT) * 100) AS achievementRate, DATEDIFF(END_DT, CURDATE()) AS dDay FROM TB_CAMPAIGN WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN START_DT AND END_DT ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_CAMPAIGN
TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, GOAL_AMT = #{goalAmt}, START_DT = #{startDt}, END_DT = #{endDt}, USE_YN = #{useYn},
THUMB_PATH = #{thumbPath},
MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW()
WHERE CAMP_SEQ = #{campSeq}
UPDATE TB_CAMPAIGN SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CAMP_SEQ = #{campSeq}
